summary: Frontend-only smoke + UI/navigation tests for Dashboard Barber PWA. All 12 features from the request were verified successfully in graceful-degradation mode (Supabase schema not yet seeded by user). Tested: Landing render + 4 role cards, Supabase setup banner, /login?role=coiffeur and ?role=gerant rendering with correct labels and inputs, signup toggle revealing prenom field, ClientFlow steps 1->3 with toggle gating, validation of phone/prenom unlocking Continue, all 4 texture options, /super-admin protected route redirect to /login, manifest.json (short_name='Barber') and sw.js both 200 OK.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 400 errors from Supabase (Failed to load resource: status 400) on Landing and ClientFlow. This is expected per request context (schema not yet executed) and the app degrades gracefully — yellow 'Configuration Supabase requise' banner displays and default consignes show. Not a defect, just informational.

action_items: No action items. App behaves correctly in graceful degradation mode.

When the user runs /app/supabase_schema.sql in Supabase, a follow-up test pass should validate auth signin/signup, file_attente persistence, and the remaining ClientFlow steps 4-8 (cuts depend on salon.coupes_actives, coiffeurs list, paiement, confirmation insert).
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx: setupNeeded is detected by a generic select error from supabase('salons'); this also fires on RLS/network errors and could yield false positives. Consider distinguishing schema-mismatch vs auth/network errors.

App.js: /super-admin Protected wrapper redirects unauthenticated users to /login (without ?role=super_admin). UX would be improved by preserving the role query param so the login page shows correct label.
ClientFlow.jsx (336 lines) is acceptable but approaches refactor threshold; consider splitting each step into its own component for testability.
test_credentials: Not applicable (auth flows not tested per request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend UI/navigation fully verified in degraded mode. Next iteration should run AFTER user executes /app/supabase_schema.sql in Supabase: then test sign-up (gerant@demo.fr / demo123), sign-in, full ClientFlow steps 4-8 with real coiffeurs/tarifs, file_attente insert and /attente/:fileId waiting page, plus Coiffeur and Gerant dashboards. Demo salon id: 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111.
